title: Bitcoin buyers add over 250,000 BTC between $59,000 and $67,000 as accumulation returns
summary: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.

title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
summary: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

title: Tether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit
summary: These options, settled in USDT, let traders hedge risk, speculate on gold prices.

title: Live markets: SpaceX surges in pre-market trading as valuation climbs above Amazon's
summary: Ether, XRP, Solana and Hyperliquid funds all took in money, but bitcoin's outflow was really just Grayscale's GBTC.

title: XRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
summary: Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone.
